title: Build and deploy with vite and netlify
body: Update Node.js and NPM versions in `netlify.toml` to align with project requirements and ensure a consistent build environment. This configuration update was made during the diagnosis of a Netlify build failure. While the primary issue was an incompatible `@netlify/plugin-nextjs` (which needs to be removed from the Netlify UI), setting explicit Node.js and NPM versions ensures the build environment matches the project's dependencies and local development setup. ---

title: Fix errors and merge to main
body: Remove unused `PerformanceOptimizer` import from `App.tsx` to fix a linting error. ---

title: Fix errors and merge to main
